# TinyLink

TinyLink is a URL shortener web app for creating custom short links, warning users before redirect, and checking click statistics.

## Key capabilities
- Custom short code creation
- Redirect notice and basic URL safety checks
- Click analytics per short link

## Public pages
- /
- /about
- /services
- /pricing
- /help
- /faq
- /privacy
- /terms
- /disclaimer

## Private or non-indexable areas
User-specific analytics pages, API routes, and operational endpoints are not intended for indexing or model summarization.
